postCleanupSummary: Removed delivery.poll.active/host.sweep/host.sweep.sessions. Verified: new trace contains only business spans.
commands: pnpm chat "phoenix delivery span fixed proof"
docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=phoenix_local_only muap-observability-prod-postgres-1 psql -U phoenix -d phoenix -t -c "SELECT count(*) FROM traces;"

docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=phoenix_local_only muap-observability-prod-postgres-1 psql -U phoenix -d phoenix -t -c "SELECT name, count(*) FROM spans WHERE name IN ('cli.event.received','router.route','router.deliver_to_agent','router.container.wake','container.wake','container.spawn','delivery.session.drain','delivery.message.deliver','delivery.channel.send','host.sweep','host.sweep.sessions') GROUP BY name ORDER BY name;"

docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=phoenix_local_only muap-observability-prod-postgres-1 psql -U phoenix -d phoenix -t -c "SELECT t.trace_id, s.name, s.span_id, s.parent_id, s.start_time FROM spans s JOIN traces t ON t.id = s.trace_rowid WHERE t.trace_id = '862db7e901c0e5ee594d61bdcadb4b24' AND s.name IN ('cli.event.received','router.route','router.deliver_to_agent','router.container.wake','container.wake','container.spawn','delivery.session.drain','delivery.message.deliver','delivery.channel.send') ORDER BY s.start_time, s.name;"
